name: A - 10yen Stamp
body_html:
Takahashi wants to send a letter to Santa Claus. He has an envelope with an XX-MATH-0-8621cf10-XX -yen (Japanese currency) stamp stuck on it.
To be delivered to Santa Claus, the envelope must have stamps in a total value of at least XX-MATH-1-8621cf10-XX yen.
Takahashi will put some more XX-MATH-2-8621cf10-XX -yen stamps so that the envelope will have stamps worth at least XX-MATH-3-8621cf10-XX yen in total.
At least how many more XX-MATH-4-8621cf10-XX -yen stamps does Takahashi need to put on the envelope?

Constraints

  • XX-MATH-5-8621cf10-XX and XX-MATH-6-8621cf10-XX are integers.
  • XX-MATH-7-8621cf10-XX

Input

Input is given from Standard Input in the following format: 

XX-MATH-8-8621cf10-XX XX-MATH-9-8621cf10-XX

Output

Print the answer as an integer.
